meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve Project Completion
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn to build high-converting user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code to finish your first real-world app today.
content.answer_block: The root cause of project abandonment is a lack of defined user flow. By implementing a frictionless onboarding sequence, you force yourself to define the core value proposition first. This narrows your scope, provides immediate milestones, and ensures your application delivers tangible results, keeping you motivated through to deployment.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: a folder full of half-finished repositories, abandoned features, and the creeping dread of 'feature creep.' The silence of a project that doesn't quite work is the graveyard of aspiring developers. You aren't failing because you lack talent; you are failing because you lack a map.

User onboarding is the skeleton of your application. When you build the path a user takes from their first click to their first 'aha!' moment, you define the absolute minimum viable product required to ship. This isn't just about UI; it's about engineering focus. Let's turn your unfinished code into a finished product.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the single action that proves your app delivers value. If the user doesn't reach this in under 60 seconds, the project is too complex.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project idea and distill it into a single, 3-step onboarding flow that leads to the core value proposition. Focus on minimizing user friction.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Map out the user journey from landing page to core feature success.'

steps.title: Skeleton Architecture
steps.description: Build the scaffolding of your onboarding flow before writing a single line of logic. This prevents over-engineering.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a boilerplate React structure for a 3-step onboarding wizard. Include state management for user progress.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Create the onboarding wizard components with state management.'

steps.title: Implement Progressive Profiling
steps.description: Don't ask for everything at once. Capture data only when it's needed to unlock the next step of the onboarding.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a schema for a user onboarding flow that captures minimal data points progressively across three steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement progressive form fields for the onboarding wizard.'

steps.title: Automated Testing of the Flow
steps.description: Ensure your onboarding is unbreakable. Use automation to simulate a user path through your app.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Playwright test script that simulates a user completing the onboarding flow from start to finish.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Create E2E tests for the onboarding journey.'

steps.title: Deployment and Feedback Loop
steps.description: Ship the onboarding flow to a staging environment to validate that users actually reach the 'Aha!' moment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a checklist for deploying an initial onboarding prototype to Vercel and setting up basic analytics.
steps.claude_code_command: claude deploy 'Push onboarding build to production environment.'

pro_tips: Never build more than three steps in an onboarding flow; drop-off rates increase exponentially after step three.
Use 'optimistic UI' during onboarding so the app feels instant, even if the backend is processing heavy AI requests.
Always include a 'skip' button; forced onboarding is a user retention killer.
Instrument your onboarding with event logging immediately to see exactly which step causes users to bounce.
Treat your onboarding code as a separate module; it should be the most modular and reusable part of your entire codebase.
resources: User Onboarding UX Best Practices: https://www.nngroup.com
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, focus on building the 'core feature' that follows it. Do not add any extra features until you have 10 users complete the onboarding process.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the roadmap, and the intent. Stop letting your projects die in the draft folder and start building software that people actually use. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
